name: Instaclaw
description: Instaclaw is a consumer AI agent platform built on the Virtuals Protocol ecosystem on Base (Ethereum Layer 2). The platform enables non-technical users to deploy their own personal AI agent in approximately 60 seconds, with no coding or cryptocurrency knowledge required. Each deployed agent connects to popular messaging applications including Telegram, iMessage, and WhatsApp, allowing users to interact with their AI assistant through the messaging platforms they already use daily. Instaclaw agents are deployed on dedicated compute infrastructure and come pre-loaded with a suite of built-in skills including web browsing, file management, research tools, and integration with the Clawlancer autonomous AI marketplace. The INSTACLAW token was launched through the Virtuals Protocol 60 Days framework on the Base blockchain, where it graduated from the bonding curve and now trades on Uniswap V2 with locked liquidity.
